results.title: Goldman Sachs bond traders stumbled as Wall Street rivals thrived: 'A fire is being lit under' them
Goldman Sachs vs. Morgan Stanley: Which Stock Has More Upside? | The Motley Fool
Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan and Morgan Stanley are part of Zacks Earnings Preview

summary: Goldman's fixed income revenue fell 10% in Q1 2026, missing estimates by $910M — a stark contrast to JPMorgan (+21% FICC to $7.1B) and Morgan Stanley (+29% bond revenues). GS has outperformed Morgan Stanley YoY on investment banking but faces scrutiny over FICC market share loss. Overall Finance sector Q1 earnings expected +19.9% YoY.
